enums.name: ScopeGrantType
enums.doc: Enumeration for different ways scopes may be adjusted when generating new tokens

values.name: Dictate
values.doc: The template dictates the scope of the new token

values.name: Grant
values.doc: The template adds scopes to the new token

values.name: Restrict
values.doc: The template restricts the parent token's scope when granting a new token

values.name: Copy
values.doc: The template copies the parent token's scope to the new token

token.name: TokenTemplate
token.doc: A template or a mold for creating new tokens

props.name: name
props.doc: Name of this template. May be empty.

props.name: scopeGrantType
props.doc: Way the scope-granting functions in this template

props.name: duration
props.doc: Duration of the created tokens. None if infinite.

token.name: TokenTemplateScope
token.doc: Links a (granted) scope to a token template

props.name: templateId
props.doc: ID of the template that grants this scope

token.name: TokenGrantRight
token.doc: Used for allowing certain token types (templates) to generate new tokens of other types

props.name: ownerTemplateId
props.doc: ID of the token template that has been given the right to generate new tokens

props.name: grantedTemplateId
props.doc: ID of the template applied to the generated tokens

props.name: revokes
props.doc: Whether generating a new token revokes the token used for authorizing that action

token.name: Token
token.doc: Represents a token that may be used for authorizing certain actions

props.name: templateId
props.doc: ID of the template used when creating this token

props.name: parentId
props.doc: ID of the token that was used to generate this token

props.name: name
props.doc: Name of this token. May be empty.
Time when this token was created

props.name: expires
props.doc: Time when this token automatically expires. None if this token doesn't expire automatically.

props.name: revoked
props.doc: Time when this token was revoked.

token.name: TokenScope
token.doc: Allows a token to be used in some scope

props.doc: ID of the token that grants or has access to the linked scope

scope.name: Scope
scope.doc: Used for limiting authorization to certain features or areas

props.name: key
props.doc: A key used for identifying this scope

props.name: parentId
props.doc: ID of the scope that contains this scope. None if this is a root-level scope.

scope.name: ScopeRight
scope.doc: Links a scope to an authentication method that grants that scope

props.doc: ID of the granted or accessible scope

props.name: usable
props.doc:
Whether the linked scope is directly accessible. 
False if the scope is only applied when granting access for other authentication methods.
